name: Plantation-Style Catfish Fillets
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw frozen fish according to package directions.
2. Mix flour with salt, pepper, and paprika.
3. Dust the catfish fillets in the seasoned flour mixture.
4. In a large, heavy skillet, sauté fillets in hot shortening until crisp and golden; remove.
5. Sauté garlic for 1 minute; add tomatoes and cook until heated through, about 2 minutes.
6. Remove tomatoes with a slotted spoon and set aside; arrange them on the dish.
7. Heat reserved sauce in the skillet; add spinach and cook just until tender.
8. Arrange spinach in the center of the dish; place fillets on top.
9. Combine remaining Parmesan cheese with other ingredients.
10. Spoon the mixture over the fillets.
11. Sprinkle with additional cheese, then broil under low heat until bubbly; serve immediately.
